channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Karachi Implements Extensive Security for Youm-i-Ali Procession
item.description: KARACHI: The city of Karachi is under tight security as it observes Youm-i-Ali, marking the martyrdom day of Hazrat Ali. Main routes, including M.A. Jinnah Road, have been closed to traffic to facilit...

item.title: Tanzania improves availability of medicines and medical supplies across health facilities
item.description: The Ministry of Health in Tanzania has made strong improvements in ensuring availability of medicines, medical supplies, diagnostics, and other essential health commodities in the country. Health Mini...

item.title: Court of Appeal adjourns PDP Ibadan convention dispute, encourages peaceful resolution
item.description: On Wednesday, Court of Appeal wey dey sit for Ibadan adjourn the matter wey concern the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) and their Ibadan elective convention. The court give the parties leave to try set...

item.title: Mercy Eke Collaborates with OPPO to Promote the Newly Launched Reno15 Series in Nigeria
item.description: Global smartphone brand OPPO don partner with popular Nigerian reality TV star and businesswoman Mercy Eke to shine light on their latest OPPO Reno15 Series. This new phone line na for modern creators...

item.title: President Samia officially receives abandoned baby girl in Dodoma
item.description: Dodoma: The President of the United Republic of Tanzania, Dr Samia Suluhu Hassan, has officially welcomed a newborn baby girl who was found abandoned in Nzega town, Tabora Region. The child, named Gra...

item.title: Yellow warning for strong winds issued for northern UK regions
item.description: The Met Office has issued a yellow weather warning for strong winds affecting parts of northern England, north Wales, and Scotland. The alert will be in place from 5am until 8pm on Thursday, with gust...

item.title: Barpeta Medical College to be Renamed; New Institution to Honour Former President Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed
item.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma announced that the state government has decided to rename Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed Medical College and Hospital as Barpeta Medical College and Hospital. The decisi...

item.title: Potential Liberal Majority and Its Impact on Canada-U.S. Trade Relations
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has announced byelections for April 13 in three ridings: Scarborough Southwest and University–Rosedale in Ontario, and Terrebonne in Quebec. If the Liberals win all three, t...

item.title: UK mortgage rates increase and products withdrawn as Middle East conflict affects markets
item.description: The UK mortgage market is experiencing significant turbulence, the most pronounced since the mini-Budget of 2022. The average rate for two-year fixed mortgages has surpassed 5%, reaching its highest l...

item.title: Village Community Honours Elderly Runners with Race, Gifts and Cheers
item.description: In a heartwarming event in a Kenyan village, elderly runners were celebrated through a special race that brought the community together. The runners, some in their 70s and 80s, participated with great...

item.title: Remembering Boncana Maïga: Malian Innovator of African Salsa and Dance Music
item.description: Boncana Maïga, the Malian flutist, composer, and arranger, passed away at the age of 77, marking the end of a remarkable era in West African music. Known for his charisma and exceptional musical talen...

item.title: Tasmania Devils to play at existing venues until Macquarie Point stadium is completed
item.description: The Tasmania Devils are expected to spend their first three AFL and AFLW seasons at existing venues as the construction of the controversial Macquarie Point waterfront stadium experiences delays. Init...

item.title: The Need for Stronger Protection and Recognition of Canadian Jews
item.description: Larry Maher argues that Canadian Jews face increasing antisemitism and that past approaches of quiet compliance and symbolic gestures have proven insufficient. Highlighting the long history of Jewish ...

item.title: 'UK vs the World' Season 3 Reveals Top 4 Queens for Grand Finale Showdown
item.description: The third season of 'UK vs the World', the popular spin-off of RuPaul's Drag Race, has officially revealed its Top 4 queens who will compete in the grand finale. This season has brought together a div...

item.title: British Couple Tragically Drown at Shellharbour Beach in Australia
item.description: A British couple tragically lost their lives at Shellharbour Beach on the New South Wales coast in Australia on Wednesday morning. The 66-year-old man and 64-year-old woman were swimming around 11am l...

item.title: Investigation Launched Over Alleged Extortion and Contraband at Kwale Custodial Centre
item.description: Tins wey dey happen for Kwale Medium Security Custodial Centre for Delta State don cause serious gbege as dem dey report extortion, intimidation, and smuggling of banned items inside the facility. One...

item.title: How the Middle East Conflict is Driving Up Fuel Prices and Living Costs in South Africa
item.description: The recent escalation of conflict in the Middle East involving Iran, the US, and Israel has caused significant disruptions in global energy markets. Brent crude oil surged by almost 18% in early March...

item.title: The Portuguese Arrival and Early Colonisation of India
item.description: This article provides a concise history of how the Portuguese became the first European colonisers of India, presented in a manner suitable for children. It begins with the story of Vasco da Gama’s pi...

item.title: General Kahariri Inspects Narok Air Force Base to Boost Operational Efficiency and Troop Welfare
item.description: On Tuesday, General Charles Kahariri, the Chief of the Defence Forces (CDF), paid a high-level visit to the Narok Forward Operating Base of the Kenya Air Force. The visit was aimed at reviewing the op...

item.title: APC sets up committee to manage hotels and transport for 2026 convention
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don begin to prepare for their 2026 National Convention by inaugurating an Accommodation and Transportation Committee for proper planning. The committee wey dey Abu...
